allow: Bash(python -m notebooklm ask "What are the main sections and features across the competitor websites? List each distinct section/page \(e.g. home, pricing, features, solutions, about, blog, docs, etc.\) and the key features highlighted.")

Bash(python -m notebooklm ask "What are the main sections and features across the competitor websites? List each distinct top-level page/route \(e.g. home, pricing, features, solutions, about, blog, docs\) and the key features/sub-sections highlighted on each. Be specific to the waste management / EPR / e-waste space if relevant.")
